values.description: Must match ADMIN_KEY env on the gateway. ≥32 chars in production/staging; anything in dev.
Matches CRON_SECRET env on the gateway. Optional — only needed to hit /internal/cron/tick.
Populated by `_Setup / 2. Create merchant` test script.
Populated by `_Setup / 2. Create merchant` test script. Plaintext, unrecoverable after first response — lose it, create a new merchant.
Populated by `_Setup / 2. Create merchant` when webhookUrl was set. Plaintext HMAC signing secret for outgoing webhooks the gateway sends to the merchant.
Populated by any `Create invoice` request.
Populated by any `Create invoice` request. Consumed by the webhook simulator so synthetic payloads target the right address.
Populated by any `Plan payout` request.
Generic fallback. Populated by `_Setup / 4. Bootstrap Alchemy webhooks` with the first `created` signing key. Each chain also gets its own `alchemySigningKey_<chainId>` entry.

Used by the parametric `Create invoice` / `Plan payout` requests. Chain IDs: 1=ETH, 10=OP, 56=BSC, 137=Polygon, 8453=Base, 42161=Arbitrum, 43114=AVAX, 900=Solana, 728126428=Tron, 800=Bitcoin, 801=Litecoin, 802=BTC testnet3, 803=LTC testnet, 1000=Monero mainnet (1001 stagenet, 1002 testnet), 999=dev.

Used by the parametric requests. Check the token registry for which symbols are valid per chain: stablecoins USDC/USDT, the native symbols ETH/POL/BNB/AVAX/TRX/SOL/BTC/LTC/XMR, and DEV on the dev chain.
Raw integer token units. 1000000 = 1.000000 USDC/USDT on 6-decimal chains. For BSC USDC/USDT (18 decimals) use 1000000000000000000 for 1 token.
Used by the parametric `Plan payout` request. Must be the correct address format for the target chain (hex for EVM, base58 for Tron/Solana).
Populated by the `Payouts / Mass payouts (batch up to 100)` test script — shared batch id of the planned legs; consumed by the ?batchId= list filter.

Matches BLOCKCYPHER_INGEST_TOKEN env on the gateway. Auth for POST /webhooks/blockcypher/{chainId} — rides in the ?token= query param of the callback URL because BlockCypher doesn't sign payloads. Fail-closed: unset server-side means the route 404s every caller.
Populated by the `Admin / Webhook deliveries / List dead deliveries` test script (first dead row's id); consumed by the replay request.

Chain-family URL segment for the `_Setup` fee-wallet requests (4b use-pool, 4c import, 4d DELETE). Valid: evm | tron | solana | utxo — but fee wallets only affect planning on solana (co-sign) and tron (gas top-up) topologies; evm registrations are ignored by the planner and monero is rejected.
Populated by 'Admin / Payout recovery / List held payouts' test script (first held leg's id). Consumed by the recover request.
Populated by the `_Setup / 3d. Consolidate` test script; consumed by `3e. Get consolidation status`.
Populated by the `_Setup / 3f. Create auto-consolidation schedule` test script; consumed by the 3h/3i/3j schedule requests.
Populated by `Admin / Debug (Monero) / Force-ingest tx` — internal transactions-row id of the manually ingested Monero credit.
64-hex Monero tx hash consumed by Admin / Debug (Monero) — inspect-tx and force-ingest-tx. Get it from the payer or a block explorer.
Populated by the `Admin / Orphans & Audit / List open orphans` test script (first row's id); consumed by the attribute/dismiss requests.
Pool address captured by the '3b-1. List pool addresses' test script (first available, non-disabled row); consumed by the 3b-2 disable / 3b-3 enable request bodies.
Chain family (evm|tron|solana|utxo) of {{poolAddress}}, captured by the same 3b-1 test script.
Operator-supplied: the real, successful on-chain tx hash (0x + 64 hex chars) read off a block explorer for the held leg's exact source->destination transfer. Consumed by 'Recover held payout'.
Set fresh on every request by the collection-level pre-request script (local scope) so Runner loops never collide on the unique externalId constraint. Nothing to fill in.
